verdict: An outstanding, masterfully syncopated Hard chart that perfectly captures the iconic Eurodance rhythm with flawless foot flow and engaging technical hold patterns.

issues.problem: Excellent use of dotted-eighth syncopation (0.346s gaps) that perfectly aligns with the off-beat synth rhythm of the track.
Brilliant technical sequence utilizing rapid 8th-note jumps and short holds to create an engaging, high-energy physical flow without breaking alternation.
Flawless alternating foot flow with comfortable diagonals and clean jumps, ensuring maximum readability and physical satisfaction.
